behavior_in_task_description.reason: instruction.md names the file src/bun.js/test/expect.zig, the three targets (expect_proto, expect_constructor, expect_static_proto), the acceptable methods (putMayBeIndex, initFast, isIndex/parseIndex), the read-only methods list, and required preserved symbols (JSPropertyIterator, Bun__JSWrappingFunction__create, applyCustomMatcher).

no_solution_leakage.reason: Instruction lists multiple acceptable approaches (putMayBeIndex, initFast with bool, isIndex/parseIndex + continue) rather than dictating the exact fix.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: Tests accept any of the three approaches via _iterator_skips_indices early-exit and generic 'safe setter' detection excluding read-only methods and bare .put().

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: All tests are static regex inspections of expect.zig source (_get_extend_body, re.search for method names); no test builds bun or executes the reproduction `Bun.jest().expect.extend({1073741820: Request})` to verify the crash is fixed.

test_not_tautological.reason: Tests require removal of bare .put() on all three targets AND presence of a non-read-only setter method, which a stub couldn't satisfy without an actual structural change.

behavior_in_tests.reason: Tests cover all three targets, safe-setter requirement, preservation of iterator/wrapper/applyCustomMatcher, and agent-config rules mentioned in instruction.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests are grouped under commented section headers: 'Fail-to-pass', 'Pass-to-pass', 'Config-derived' with tags like [pr_diff], [static], [agent_config].

structured_data_schema.reason: Task is a code fix, no structured data output.

no_typos.reason: Paths and symbol names (expect.zig, putMayBeIndex, Bun__JSWrappingFunction__create) are consistent and correct.

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: Instruction names the file but not the exact line; localization within the file is still the agent's job, and the file is clearly relevant to the domain.

config_edit_scope_bounded.reason: Code-only task, not an agentmd-edits task.
